subcodes.first_line: O pure and sanctified leaf! Shouldst thou become aware, through the bounties of the Ancient Beauty, of His favors unto the handmaidens of the All-Merciful, such would be the intensity of thy joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه طیبه زکیه اگر بالطاف جمال قدم در حق اماء رحمن پی بری ازشدت بشارت و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transcending the material condition
